title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
